# Alentro Global Services

> Trusted IT Solutions Company in Mumbai, India
> Website: https://alentro-website.vercel.app
> Founded: 2014 | 500+ clients served | Pan-India operations
> Phone: +91-7045400592
> LinkedIn: linkedin.com/company/alentro-global-services

## About

Alentro Global Services is a leading IT company headquartered in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. Founded in 2014, we deliver end-to-end IT solutions to SMEs and growing businesses across Mumbai and Pan-India. We maintain a 99.9% uptime SLA and serve clients across Manufacturing, Retail, Healthcare, BFSI, Education, Logistics, and Hospitality sectors.

## Services

- IT Infrastructure Setup — servers, storage, networking, workstations, data centre design
- Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC) — preventive maintenance, hardware coverage, quarterly health checks
- In-House IT Support — dedicated on-site IT professionals embedded in client teams
- Helpdesk Services — 24/7 multi-tier L1/L2/L3 support with defined SLA windows
- Network and Server Management — LAN/WAN, routers, switches, firewalls, NAS/SAN
- Firewall and Cybersecurity Solutions — NGFW (Fortinet, Sophos, Cisco), vulnerability assessment, EDR
- Cloud Services (AWS, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform) — migration, managed ops, FinOps
- Staff Augmentation — certified IT professionals on short or long-term contracts
- IT Consulting — IT strategy, roadmap, vendor selection, digital transformation advisory
- Cloud Migration — zero-downtime migration to AWS, Azure, or GCP
- Data Backup and Recovery — backup strategy, DR planning, business continuity
- IT Audit — infrastructure assessment, compliance checks, risk management

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2014
- Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
- Coverage: Pan-India (Mumbai, Pune, Delhi, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Kolkata)
- Clients served: 500+
- Uptime SLA: 99.9%
- Support: 24/7 via phone, email, and WhatsApp
- Critical issue response time: within 1 hour
